The '''Norulac Freebooters''', also known as the '''Norulac Pirates''', were a group of [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]] originating on the [[Inner Rim/Legends|Inner Rim]] planet of [[Norulac]], and known to be active in that area beginning a few years prior to the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], if not earlier. They were infamous for their regular raids on the agricultural planet of [[Taanab/Legends|Taanab]], lasting until [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]], when [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]] happened to be in the system at the time. With the gambler at their helm, the local defense fleet decisively won the [[Battle of Taanab/Legends|Battle of Taanab]], capturing or destroying nearly all the Freebooters. Rumor has it Calrissian won the deed to a [[Clendor]]an brewery for his trouble.
